notes:
2026-06-10 NIGHTLY:
MIN_SCORE 9->8 (BUG FIX): 2026-06-09 session wrote intent in notes but config value stayed 9. apply_config_to_trader() read stale 9, wrote 9 back to trader.py. Bot ran full session at wrong threshold. Confirmed: log shows Min score 9/13 at 23:05 restart. Score-8 EV=+31.8% (50% WR, 4 trades) vs Score-9 EV=+10.2% (21% WR, 14 trades). 3x better EV.
ATOM WATCH: 3 trades, 0% WR, avg -10.6%. Formal removal at 5 trades negative EV. Currently 3/5. Remove if 2 more losses.
RUNE KEEP: 5 trades, WR 20%, +3.3% avg. Trail saving it. Keep.
TRAIL_PCT=8% KEPT: Avg winner 8.5h -- trail is primary alpha. Not touching.
NO TRADES TODAY: Market ranging, ADX 11-29 all coins. Bot correctly idle.

2026-06-07 NIGHTLY:
MIN_SCORE 7->8: Recent score-7 trades (id11 SUI -32.3%, id27 ETH -27.1%, id15/16 SUI near-flat) avg -14.4%. Score-8 EV=+44% (67% WR). Removing score-7 threshold removes marginal setups missing OB/UT Bot confirmation.
kPEPE REMOVED: 4 trades, 0% WR, -12.2% avg, all SL hits. ADX=82 (highest in list) yet stopped out by noise every time. SL at 2% too tight for token volatility. Total drag: -48.9%.
TRAIL_PCT=8% KEPT: Caught SUI +83.4%, WLD +132.9%, ATOM +27.4%. Alpha generator of the system.
MIN_ADX=30 KEPT: Losses occur at high ADX too (ARB 62 -22.8%, ATOM 57 -29.0%) -- ADX above 30 is necessary but not sufficient.
MAX_TRADES=2 KEPT: Max drawdown -75.6% already significant. Need more data for 3 concurrent.
BUG: SIGTERM handler missing in live.py -- orphan PID recurs every nightly session. Fix pending approval.

2026-06-09 NIGHTLY:
MIN_SCORE 9->8: Score-8 EV=+31.8% (4 trades, WR 50%) vs Score-9 EV=+10.2% (14 trades, WR 21%). Score-9 is 3x worse EV. With MIN_SCORE=9, bot took 0 new trades on 2026-06-08 full session. Reverting to 8.
FVG weight 2->1: 'bearish' (Bearish FVG) factor has WR 12% (2W/15L) -- inversely predictive for SHORT entries. FVGs are price magnets; bearish FVG below entry attracts price UP into the gap (against short). Weight halved to reduce its dominance.
UT Bot weight 2->1: 'ut' factor WR 0% (0W/3L). UT Bot on 1H is a lagging confirmation -- fires after the move starts, producing chased entries. Sample small (3 trades) but direction is clear. Keep at 1 (not 0) until more data.
TRAIL_PCT=8% KEPT: Avg winning trade 8.5h -- trail is primary alpha generator. 
SIGTERM fix applied to live.py: lambda sigterm -> sys.exit(0) after atexit.register. Prevents recurring orphan PID on systemd stop.
